final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce marketing (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "promotional" aesthetic with layered typography and visual complexity — references in the spirit of 2020s Chinese e-commerce campaign graphics, Japanese ポスター (poster) maximalist tradition, contemporary streetwear brand lookbooks; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include artistic typography with font stacking/layering, must include products or main subject partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements, must achieve complex but not cluttered visual density
Subject: must include e-commerce products or promotional subject as focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional campaign atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a commercial promotional direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must include artistic typography, font stacking, product/subject overlapping text, complex but organized composition, 16:9 aspect ratio
Avoid: must avoid cluttered/chaotic visual organization
